decision: Create canonical atomic append log writer at 0_kernel/lib/io/atomic_append_log_writer_v1.py with CDR CRITICAL controls before retrofit.
design_constraints: Append one complete JSONL record per call
No replacement of existing log files
Structured record only; deny raw string logging
Record size cap and log file size/rotation policy fields
Optional but explicit fsync durability mode; governance default requires fsync for critical logs
Failure event output for every DENY/ERROR outcome
name: ADS_ATOMIC_APPEND_LOG_WRITER_CDR_CRITICAL_v1
problem: MetaBlooms has append-only JSONL/log/ledger sites that should not be routed through replace-style atomic JSON document writer.
